title: agathis alba
intro: Agathis alba, also known as the white kauri or Dammara, is a type of evergreen coniferous tree native to the tropical forests of Borneo and the Philippines. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its essential oils and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Agathis alba include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function, making it a sought-after remedy for various health concerns. Agathis alba is commonly prepared as a decoction or infused oil, which can be used to treat various ailments, and its extracts are also used in modern herbal medicine.
